remember: Students will be able to recall the plot, characters, and setting of the story 'The Last Lesson' by Alphonse Daudet.
Students will be able to identify the historical context and significance of the story.
understand: Students will be able to analyze the themes of nationalism, patriotism, and cultural identity in the story.
Students will be able to explain the character's emotions and motivations through their actions and dialogue.
apply: Students will be able to apply the concepts of historical context and cultural identity to their understanding of the story.
Students will be able to evaluate the impact of historical events on the characters and their community.
analyze: Students will be able to analyze the author's use of language and literary devices to convey the themes and emotions of the story.
Students will be able to compare and contrast the characters' perspectives and experiences in the story.

ncert_objectives: To understand the historical background and the significance of the story.
To analyze the themes of nationalism and patriotism in the story.
To explain the character's emotions and motivations through their actions and dialogue.
board_exam_objectives: To analyze the themes and emotions of the story through the character's actions and dialogue.
To evaluate the impact of historical events on the characters and their community.
To compare and contrast the characters' perspectives and experiences in the story.
